HomePage.resume: I’m passionate about building data-driven web applications and exploring how AI can enhance user experience and decision-making. With a strong interest in both Web Development and Data Science, I love creating digital solutions that are not only functional but also intelligent.

bento.title: Featured Sections

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: A brief introduction to who I am.

resume.paragraf_1: Hi! I’m a fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering with a strong passion for Web Development and Data Science. During my studies, I gained hands-on experience as a Full-stack Developer through internships and also worked on academic projects in Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, and recommendation systems.
resume.paragraf_2: I enjoy turning ideas into functional digital solutions, whether by developing web applications with Laravel, PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, or by analyzing data and building models with Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.
resume.paragraf_3: I’m an analytical and adaptive learner who is eager to keep growing and contribute to creating innovative, data-driven technologies.
